statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice: Garage now has a read-only Recent Diagnostic Activity panel on [garage.html](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:64).

What changed:
- Added grouped diagnostic activity rendering in [garage.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:179) from existing Garage data only: `warning_light_*`, `quick_capture_*`, `nfc_task_*`, maintenance logs, and area journals.
- Added mobile-safe styling in [styles.css](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/styles.css:5549).
- Added search entry for `recent diagnostic activity` in [search-data.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js:664).
- Extended browser-smoke assertions in [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:284).
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v263`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Existing Edge `--dump-dom` smoke path still failed with the known missing-main/empty render issue.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for Garage empty and populated iPhone states, desktop render, no horizontal overflow, search coverage, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Screenshots saved under `debug-screenshots/audit-v263-*`.

Next safe slice: mobile density pass on the growing Diagnostics page.
